        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Person> Person => __Person ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Person, __Create_Person());

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Person>? __Person;

        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Person> __Create_Person()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Person>
            {
                PropertiesFactory = __CreateProperties_Person,
                ConstructorFactory = __CreateConstructor_Person,
                IsRecordType = true,
                Provider = this,
            };
        }

                DeclaringType = (global::PolyType.Abstractions.IObjectTypeShape<global::TestNamespace.Person>)Person,
                ParametersFactory = __CreateConstructorParameters_Person,

                IsPublic = true,
            };
        }
